description: Single source of truth for a GapMap MATE user. Every specialist engine reads and writes here. Stable/Evolving fields per Phase One Architecture v1.0 and Phase Two Design Intent v1.0. Schema v1.1 — locked for MVP following review by Paul & Cipher (5 July 2026).
name: UserProfile

action_plan.description: Evolving memory: concrete next steps (Phase 4 Decision Support Engine writes here)

assessment_confidence.description: Evolving memory: Smudge's evidence quality assessment across the six Operational Picture areas. Measures evidence sufficiency, NOT user honesty. Calculated by Understanding Engine.

capability_map.description: Evolving memory: skill -> civilian translation with evidence (Phase 3 Capability Intelligence Engine writes here)

evidence_ref.description: Reference to an entry in evidence_log for full provenance traceability

communication_preferences.description: Future placeholder: preferred interaction style. No behaviour implemented yet — reserved for future Smudge adaptation based on individual communication patterns observed during discovery.

pacing.description: Future: how quickly Smudge progresses through topics — 'gentle', 'standard', 'direct'

preferred_style.description: Future: general communication style preference (free text, to be refined)

confidence_scores.description: Evolving memory: per-capability confidence rating with evidence references (Phase 3)

evidence_ref.description: Reference to an entry in evidence_log for full provenance traceability

evidence_log.description: Evolving memory: Evidence Provenance Store. Every key observation, capability claim, or assessment is logged here with its source, enabling full traceability. Other fields (capability_map.evidence_ref, confidence_scores.evidence_ref) point back to entries here.

content.description: The actual observation or evidence captured

evidence_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence entry (e.g. 'EV-001')

goals.description: Evolving memory: what the individual has told MATE they want — ambition, purpose, not just 'what job'

milestones.description: Evolving memory: transition milestones (Phase 5 Transition Partnership Engine writes here)

operational_context.description: Evolving memory: 'What influences your journey?' — constraints, time, funding, support network, learning, confidence factors

operational_picture_confirmed.description: Evolving memory: has the user explicitly confirmed 'Yes, that's me' — agreeing the Operational Picture accurately reflects their situation. Tied to the current operational_picture_version. Required gate before Phase Three.

operational_picture_history.description: Evolving memory: Operational Picture version history. Each confirmation or correction creates a new version entry, providing a lightweight audit trail of how the user's picture has evolved.

confirmed_date.description: When the user confirmed this version (null if not yet confirmed)

correction_note.description: If this version was created by a correction, what changed

summary.description: Brief description of the Operational Picture at this version

operational_picture_version.description: Evolving memory: current version of the Operational Picture. Increments on correction. Each version requires its own confirmation. Version 0 = no picture yet formed.

personal_context.description: Evolving memory: 'Where are you now?' — current circumstances, only what's volunteered

professional_identity.description: Stable memory: 'Who are you?' — how the individual understands themselves, beyond rank/branch. Narrative, not categories.

recommended_pathways.description: Evolving memory: pathway matches (Phase 4 Decision Support Engine writes here)

safety_flags.description: Operational tracking: Principle VII escalation markers, internal only, never surfaced directly to user

service_branch.description: Stable memory: Army, Royal Navy, RAF, Royal Marines, etc.

service_history.description: Stable memory: 'What have you done?' — roles, responsibilities, deployments, achievements, leadership, decision-making evidence

tos_phase.description: Operational tracking: current position in the 7-phase TOS lifecycle

user_confidence.description: Evolving memory: 'How well do we understand?' — the individual's own confidence in their transition (0-10 scale)

years_served.description: Stable memory: total years of service
